category_sources: Official wvWare homepage describes wv as a library and utilities for loading and parsing Microsoft Word file formats.
source_facts.description says wv provides programs for accessing Microsoft Word documents.
display_name_sources: Official wvWare homepage identifies the project and library as wv.
docs_sources: Official wvWare Toolkit page gives additional format and build information; no newer dedicated docs surface was found.
Official wvWare homepage documents the project, utilities, development, and resources.
repo_sources: Official wvWare homepage states the project is hosted on SourceForge and references CVS development workflow.
SourceForge wvWare project exposes CVS as its source-control area.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Microsoft Word document access.
source_facts.executables lists conversion tools such as wvHtml, wvLatex, wvPDF, and wvText.
